Draws text on a Pebble watch window, specifies version control ignores, app metadata, and build script.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Draws text on a Pebble watch window with performance profiling.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories to ignore in version control, including build files and waf lock files.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "draw_text" app, including UUID, version, and target platforms.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling Pebble projects with support for multiple platforms and optional worker binaries.
